title: Rodent Proofing in New Brunswick, NJ | $500-$3,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional rodent proofing services in New Brunswick, NJ. Protect your home or business from mice and rats. Pricing $500-$3,000. Licensed experts serving Middlesex County.
intro: New Brunswick residents and businesses face persistent rodent challenges due to the city's dense urban environment, historic buildings, and proximity to the Raritan River. Our professional rodent proofing services provide comprehensive protection for homes, apartments, and commercial properties throughout New Brunswick and surrounding Middlesex County areas. We use proven exclusion techniques to keep mice and rats out permanently, with pricing ranging from $500 to $3,000 depending on property size and severity.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of rodent control experience to New Brunswick, combining advanced inspection technology with time-tested exclusion methods. Our licensed technicians understand the unique pest pressures facing New Brunswick properties, from Rutgers University area apartments to historic downtown buildings, and we guarantee our rodent proofing work with comprehensive warranties.
localContext: New Brunswick's mix of 19th-century architecture, modern apartment complexes near Rutgers University, and commercial districts along George Street creates diverse entry points for rodents. The city's location along the Raritan River and aging infrastructure in neighborhoods like the Fifth Ward and Hungary Woods means properties require specialized rodent proofing strategies tailored to New Brunswick's unique building characteristics.

faqs.question: How much does rodent proofing cost in New Brunswick, NJ?
faqs.answer: Rodent proofing in New Brunswick typically costs between $500 and $3,000, depending on your property size, the number of entry points, and the extent of exclusion work needed. Smaller homes or apartments may fall on the lower end, while larger properties or those with extensive foundation gaps, roof vulnerabilities, or multiple buildings require more comprehensive treatment. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes for all New Brunswick properties.

faqs.question: What does rodent proofing involve for New Brunswick homes?
faqs.answer: Our rodent proofing service includes a thorough inspection of your New Brunswick property to identify all potential entry points, sealing gaps and cracks in foundations, walls, and rooflines with durable materials like steel wool and caulk, installing door sweeps and vent covers, and addressing vulnerabilities around utility lines. We also provide recommendations for reducing attractants and ongoing monitoring to ensure long-term protection against mice and rats.

faqs.question: Why are rodents common in New Brunswick properties?
faqs.answer: New Brunswick's urban density, large student population near Rutgers University, aging building stock, and proximity to the Raritan River create ideal conditions for rodent activity. Historic buildings often have gaps in foundations and walls, while restaurant-heavy areas like George Street and Easton Avenue provide abundant food sources. The city's older sewer systems and densely packed neighborhoods allow rodents to travel easily between properties, making professional rodent proofing essential.

faqs.question: How long does rodent proofing last in New Brunswick?
faqs.answer: Professional rodent proofing in New Brunswick typically lasts several years when properly installed and maintained. We use commercial-grade materials designed to withstand New Jersey weather conditions and rodent gnawing. Most of our exclusion work comes with warranties, and we recommend annual inspections to ensure seals remain intact, especially after harsh winters or if you notice any new pest activity around your property.
